top_signals.title: BHP Explores Sale of Chilean Desalination Plant, Power Lines
top_signals.summary: BHP Group is exploring the sale of a desalination plant in Chile, along with its electricity transmission assets, extending a strategy of monetizing infrastructure as the world’s biggest miner concentrates capital on its core copper business, according to people familiar with the matter.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Remarks by Commissioner Dombrovskis at the ECOFIN press conference
